events.title: Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome
events.venue: Jackman Humanities Building, 170 St. George St.
events.raw_excerpt: Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome June 9, 2026 You're invited to celebrate the publication of Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome , by Alison Keith.
